📅 Book Appointment 📞 +91-756-888-3422

About

Understanding Ear, Nose & Throat Disorders

At Rawat Hospital, we specialise in comprehensive ear, nose and throat care. From common issues like ear infections, wax blockages, and hearing loss to complex conditions such as tympanic membrane perforations and otosclerosis, our ENT experts ensure accurate diagnosis and advanced treatment.

We also provide ear surgeries, hearing aids, and cochlear implant consultations to improve your hearing health and quality of life. Our team uses the latest endoscopic techniques to deliver precise, minimally invasive care for patients across Bikaner and western Rajasthan.

When to See Us

Symptoms & Warning Signs

  • Persistent ear pain or discharge
  • Blocked or stuffy nose lasting more than 10 days
  • Hearing loss or muffled sounds
  • Ringing or buzzing in the ears (tinnitus)
  • Recurring sore throat or tonsillitis
  • Nasal polyps or chronic sinusitis
  • Voice changes or hoarseness
  • Difficulty swallowing

How We Treat It

Our Approach

We begin with a thorough clinical assessment using modern endoscopic equipment to visualise the ear canal, nasal passages, and throat. Treatment is tailored to the specific condition and its severity.

  • Endoscopic diagnosis & nasal evaluation
  • Medical therapy (antibiotics, corticosteroids, antihistamines)
  • Surgical intervention (septoplasty, FESS, tonsillectomy, myringotomy)
📅 Book Appointment 📞 +91-756-888-3422

Book your appointment today

Take the first step toward expert care. Appointments available Monday – Saturday.

RAWAT HOSPITAL

Rawat Hospital offers expert care for ENT issues like ear, nose, and throat allergies, sinuses, and hearing loss. We provide advanced treatment for head & neck cancer.
